# render-diff

Contributes a `PluginChanges.DiffRenderer` for the exports facet so PR review panes show added/removed exported symbols.

## Plugin reference

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Diff renderer for the exports facet (PR review).
- Web:
  - Contributes: `PluginChanges.DiffRenderer` "Exports"
  - Uses: `review/plugin-changes.PluginChangesSlots`
